pr_title: Add duplicate detection to the CSV import job
pr_description: Adds has_duplicates() to flag CSV batches that contain repeated values before they're written to the orders table.
injected_issue: has_duplicates() compares every pair of items with a nested double loop (O(n^2)) instead of using a set for an O(n) check, on a function documented as running on batches of tens of thousands of rows on the hot import path.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: The tests only use tiny 0-3 element lists, so correctness holds and the quadratic blow-up at import-sized volumes never shows up as a test failure or timeout.
